# PatternAligned
# AI discoverability index for LLM crawlers

name: PatternAligned
type: cognitive alignment infrastructure
summary: Behavioral infrastructure layer that maps cognitive patterns, detects AI model drift, and maintains cross-model alignment for high-agency users.

primary_urls:
